paragraphs: Carelabs inspects the power quality for Philippine s businesses. Our goal is to prevent your electrical systems, appliances, and equipment from failing due to power supply fluctuations.

Numerous organi z ations and a growing number of individual customers deploy energy-sensitive data collection, monitoring, and instrumentation systems. Few electrical appliances are built to accommodate the wide range of voltage changes that occur with distributed ene rgy. The majori ty of electrical equipment is designed to ma nage particular s upply variations. Carelabs provides specialists that can a ssist with power quality concerns such as equipment installation, control, protection, and power conditioning.

All electrical networks have power outages, which occur more frequently when storms, natural disasters, or accidents destroy power lines. Changing the source of one’s electrical energy is completely commonplace. Changes, interruptions, and distortions in the distribution of electricity from an electricity network are divided into three categories:
1. A frequency deviation happens when a frequency falls outside of its natural frequency range.
2. Voltage disturbances arise when the voltage’s shape remains constant, but its amplitude exceeds the average range.
2.1 Examples of short-term fluctuations include voltage dips and voltage spikes lasting up to one minute.
2.2 Under voltages and over voltages are instances of fluctuations with a longer duration.
2.3 Unbalanced voltage: This occurs when the load is not distributed evenly across the phases, resulting in overheating of the equipment.
2.4 Difference in voltage between ground and neutral
3.Disturbances caused by distortion, which happens when the shape of the voltage is not uniform or smooth.
3.1 Harmonics and inter-harmonics cause overheating, power loss, inefficient power use, and resonance concerns in electronic devices.
3.2 Transients lasting less than a tenth of a second can damage switch contact surfaces, reduce system efficiency, and cause premature failure of motor drives and control.

We provide power quality analysis services in major cities including Mani la, Quezon, Davao, Caloocan, and Cebu . Contact us immediately to schedule a power quality study or to receive a quote.

Analysis of Surges and Transients: In this inquiry, surges and transients will be identified.

The goal of this investigation is to establish the best reactive power at the distribution and load ends.
This analysis would evaluate and coordinate captive power to supply demand while minimizing energy surcharges and fuel use.
Load Flow Study: This analysis anticipates power flow magnitudes, power factor, voltage levels, and losses in system branches based on operating conditions.
